iceland.title: The Epic of Fire and Ice
iceland.description: A raw, primordial landscape forged by volcanoes and glaciers, defined by roaring waterfalls, black sand beaches, and otherworldly lava fields.

bestTime.description: Best for ring road trips, waterfalls, and midnight sun.
Perfect for northern lights and ice cave adventures.

highlights.title: The Golden Circle
highlights.subtitle: Iceland's Iconic Route
highlights.description: A legendary route featuring Gullfoss waterfall, the erupting Geysir geothermal area, and Þingvellir National Park where tectonic plates visibly separate.

highlights.title: Jökulsárlón & Diamond Beach
highlights.subtitle: Glacial Wonders
highlights.description: Electric-blue icebergs drift through a glacier lagoon before washing onto black volcanic sands like scattered diamonds.

highlights.title: Blue Lagoon & Sky Lagoon
highlights.subtitle: Geothermal Relaxation
highlights.description: Mineral-rich geothermal pools surrounded by lava fields offer Iceland’s signature wellness experience.

destinations.name: Reykjavík
destinations.description: Iceland's colorful capital known for Nordic cafés, creative culture, modern architecture, and lively waterfront districts.

destinations.name: The Golden Circle
destinations.description: Iceland's most famous scenic route featuring Þingvellir National Park, Gullfoss waterfall, and the erupting Geysir geothermal area.

destinations.name: Jökulsárlón Glacier Lagoon
destinations.description: A breathtaking glacial lagoon filled with floating blue icebergs drifting toward the Atlantic Ocean.

destinations.name: Diamond Beach
destinations.description: A dramatic black sand beach where crystal-clear ice chunks wash ashore like scattered diamonds.

destinations.name: Vík í Mýrdal
destinations.description: A charming coastal village famous for black sand beaches, basalt sea stacks, and towering cliffs.

destinations.name: Blue Lagoon
destinations.description: Iceland's iconic geothermal spa surrounded by volcanic lava fields and mineral-rich milky-blue waters.

destinations.name: Sky Lagoon
destinations.description: A luxurious oceanside geothermal spa offering infinity-edge lagoon views and Icelandic wellness rituals.

destinations.name: Skógafoss
destinations.description: One of Iceland's most powerful waterfalls, famous for its massive cascade and frequent rainbows.

destinations.name: Seljalandsfoss
destinations.description: A unique waterfall where visitors can walk behind the cascading curtain of water.

destinations.name: Snæfellsnes Peninsula
destinations.description: Often called 'Iceland in Miniature' for its volcanoes, glaciers, lava fields, cliffs, and fishing villages.

destinations.name: Akureyri
destinations.description: A scenic northern Iceland town surrounded by fjords, mountains, and whale-watching opportunities.

destinations.name: Reynisfjara Black Sand Beach
destinations.description: A world-famous volcanic beach known for basalt columns, roaring Atlantic waves, and sea stacks.

experiences.title: Drive the Ring Road across Iceland
